response: The 2007 documentary *Zoo* was more successful than the 1998 documentary *Divine Trash*. *Zoo* was selected as one of the top five American films to be presented at the Directors' Fortnight sidebar at the 2007 Cannes Film Festival, and it premiered at the Sundance Film Festival in 2007. *Divine Trash*, directed by Steve Yeager, was released in 1998. While specific success metrics are not provided, *Zoo* gained wider recognition and was featured at a major international film festival, indicating greater success than *Divine Trash*.
